fields.htmlContent:
Comprehensive Test Form

This schema exercises every field type and every condition operator. Follow the instructions in each question to verify conditional logic.

Sections: 1) Driver Inputs → 2) Field-condition tests → 3) Expression-condition tests → 4) Rich-content fields → 5) Matrix fields → 6) Multi-effect & combined logic

fields.title: 1 · Driver Inputs (set these first — all other sections react to them)

fields.question: Driver Radio — pick an option (used by equals / notEquals / empty / notEmpty tests)
Driver Text — type a word (used by equals / notEquals / contains / empty / notEmpty tests)
Driver Number — enter a number (used by greaterThan / lessThan / expression tests)
Driver Checkbox — tick one or more (used by includes / empty / notEmpty tests)
Driver Dropdown — choose a size (used by equals / notEquals tests)
Driver Multi-Select Dropdown — pick one or more (used by includes / empty / notEmpty tests)
Driver Boolean — yes or no (used by equals test)
Driver Slider — pick 1-10 (used by numeric comparison & expression tests)
Driver Rating — 1-5 stars (used by greaterThanOrEqual / lessThanOrEqual tests)
Driver Ranking — drag to rank (used by includes test)
Driver Long Text — write a paragraph (used by contains / empty tests)
Driver Multitext — fill in the sub-fields
EQUALS — visible when Driver Radio = Alpha
NOT EQUALS — visible when Driver Radio ≠ Alpha
EQUALS (text) — visible when Driver Text = 'hello'
NOT EQUALS (text) — visible when Driver Text ≠ 'hello'
CONTAINS — visible when Driver Text contains 'world'
CONTAINS (longtext) — visible when Driver Long Text contains 'test'
EMPTY — visible when Driver Text is empty (clear it to see this)
NOT EMPTY — visible when Driver Text is not empty (type anything)
EMPTY (radio) — visible when Driver Radio has no selection
NOT EMPTY (radio) — visible when Driver Radio has a selection
INCLUDES — visible when Driver Checkbox includes 'Yankee'
INCLUDES (multiselectdropdown) — visible when Driver Multi-Select includes 'Green'
INCLUDES (ranking) — visible when Driver Ranking includes 'Second'
EMPTY (check) — visible when Driver Checkbox has nothing ticked
NOT EMPTY (check) — visible when Driver Checkbox has at least one tick
EQUALS (dropdown) — visible when Driver Dropdown = Medium
NOT EQUALS (dropdown) — visible when Driver Dropdown ≠ Medium
EQUALS (boolean) — visible when Driver Boolean = Yes
GREATER THAN — visible when Driver Slider > 5
GREATER THAN OR EQUAL — visible when Driver Rating ≥ 3
LESS THAN — visible when Driver Slider < 5
LESS THAN OR EQUAL — visible when Driver Rating ≤ 2
GREATER THAN (number input) — visible when Driver Number > 50
LESS THAN (number input) — visible when Driver Number < 50
EXPR > — visible when {drv-slider} > 7
EXPR < — visible when {drv-slider} < 3
EXPR >= — visible when {drv-rating} >= 4
EXPR <= — visible when {drv-rating} <= 2
EXPR == — visible when {drv-slider} == 5
EXPR != — visible when {drv-slider} != 5
Arithmetic — computed sum
EXPR && — visible when {drv-slider} > 3 AND {drv-rating} > 2   (both must be true)
EXPR || — visible when {drv-slider} > 8 OR {drv-rating} > 4   (either is true)
EXPR ! (negation) — visible when NOT ({drv-slider} > 5)   (slider must be ≤ 5)
COMPLEX EXPR — visible when ({drv-slider} * {drv-rating}) > 20
MEMBER ACCESS — visible when {drv-text}.length > 5   (type more than 5 characters in Driver Text)
NUMBER EXPR — visible when {drv-number} > 100   (enter > 100 in Driver Number)
VISIBLE effect — this field appears only when Driver Boolean = Yes
ENABLE effect — this field is disabled until Driver Boolean = Yes
REQUIRED effect — this field becomes required when Driver Boolean = Yes
MULTIPLE EFFECTS — visible when Radio ≠ empty, required when Slider > 5 (two separate rules)
AND logic — visible when Driver Radio = Alpha AND Driver Dropdown = Large   (both required)
OR logic — visible when Driver Radio = Bravo OR Driver Dropdown = Small   (either works)
MIXED AND — visible when Driver Boolean = Yes AND {drv-slider} > 5   (field + expression conditions together)
MIXED OR — visible when Driver Text contains 'special' OR {drv-slider} == 10   (field + expression, either works)

fields.title: 6 · Conditional Section (entire section hidden until Driver Radio = Charlie)

fields.question: You unlocked the hidden section! This entire section is only visible when Driver Radio = Charlie.
Inner conditional — pick one (selecting 'Show nested' reveals a nested field below)
Nested conditional — visible only when the inner radio = 'Show nested'   (condition inside a conditional section!)

fields.title: 7 · Rich Content Fields (html, image, display, signature, diagram)

fields.htmlContent:
HTML Field

This is a styled HTML block with a link, emphasis, and a list:

  1. Item one
  2. Item two
  3. Item three

⚠ Conditional HTML

This HTML block only appears when Driver Slider > 5.

fields.question: Image Field
fields.caption: A 400×200 placeholder image for testing

fields.question: Display — Simple References
Display — Computed Expressions
fields.content:
## Computed Results

- Slider × Rating = **<{drv-slider} * {drv-rating}>**
- Slider + Number = **<{drv-slider} + {drv-number}>**
- (Slider - Rating) = **<{drv-slider} - {drv-rating}>**
- Slider mod 3 = **<{drv-slider} % 3>**

fields.question: Display — Conditional (visible when Slider > 5 AND Rating > 3)
fields.content:
## High Scores Detected!

*Both Slider and Rating are above the threshold.*

- Combined: **<{drv-slider} + {drv-rating}>** points

fields.question: Signature Field — draw your signature below
Diagram Field — sketch or annotate below
Single Matrix — select one option per row
Multi Matrix — select multiple options per row
Conditional Matrix — visible only when Driver Boolean = Yes

fields.title: 9 · Every Field Type with a Condition (each hidden until Driver Slider ≥ 3)

fields.question: Text (string) — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Text (number) — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Text (email) — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Text (date) — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Text (tel) — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Text (url) — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Text (time) — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Text (datetime-local) — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Text (month) — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Long Text — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Multitext — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Radio — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Checkbox — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Boolean — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Dropdown — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Multi-Select Dropdown — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Rating — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Ranking — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Slider — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Single Matrix — visible when Slider ≥ 3
Multi Matrix — visible when Slider ≥ 3
